untranslatable_reason: Bearish Abandoned Baby is a three-candle pattern requiring precise identification of: (1) white candle on bar[i-2], (2) doji with lower shadow gap on bar[i-1], and (3) black candle on bar[i]. The pattern requires multi-bar lookback and doji detection (close ≈ open) which cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. ALLOWED_REGIMES does not include 'BULL_MARKET' — only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are permitted.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using body, lower_wick, and close comparisons, but true candlestick pattern recognition requires bar-by-bar sequence validation across 3 candles. The target regime 'BULL_MARKET' is not in the allowed regime list and should be mapped to 'TRENDING_UP'. Breakout window is 4 days. Exit condition was inferred as reversal (close above previous close) since author provided no exit guidance.
